name: libdata-validate-uri-perl
title: libdata-validate-uri-perl
description:
common URI validation methods
The Data::Validate::URI module collects common URI validation routines to
make input validation and untainting easier and more readable.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libdata-validate-uri-perl because common URI validation methods.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libdata-validate-uri-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libdata-validate-uri-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libdata-validate-uri-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
